content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Accepted the amendment; the described force-complete path can currently drop required propose_new_bead follow-up creation below the parsimonious threshold.

## Votes

- `fr-2-08e7c38e`: Accept
  The issue is valid. create_force_completed_propose_new_bead_followups passes the distinct source count into handle_propose_new_bead, and handle_propose_new_bead returns Pending when that count is below the configured threshold after only duplicate/existing-bead checks. Since the force-complete contract requires propose_new_bead deferrals to become beads when the br adapter is present, a single-reviewer accepted deferral can be journaled as pending instead of creating the follow-up. A force-complete-specific creation path that still runs the existing duplicate and existing-bead checks is technically appropriate.
